description: Square graphic from the DHS 'Know2Protect' 'Top 10 Tips2Protect' series. Blue gradient background (light blue top, navy below) with cut-paper summer clip-art across the top: clouds, butterflies, a camera, a red-and-white life ring, a green popsicle, blue sunglasses, a watermelon slice, and a sun. A yellow rounded banner with black bold text reads 'TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT.' Large white bold text at left reads 'TIP 5.' The center has an orange silhouette map of the contiguous United States with a magenta map-pin marker rising from it; the pin's circular center shows a black 'X'. Large white centered bold text reads: 'Turn off location data services on social media and nonessential apps.' At the bottom are the white DHS seal and the 'know2protect' speech-bubble logo with the line 'Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation.'
notable_text: TOP 10 TIPS2PROTECT; TIP 5; Turn off location data services on social media and nonessential apps.; know2protect - Together We Can Stop Online Child Exploitation
